OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE
From: Ailsa Terry 
Sent: 10 June 2025 09:39
To: Peter Mandelson 
Cc: Caroline Hurndall 
 Jonathan Powell
 Rob Dixon (Cabinet Oﬃce) (Sensi[ve)
 Rich Morris (No.10) 
; James Roscoe 
Subject: 
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE
Peter
I agree this is extremely important, I have been underlining with others why it matters and there were 
various plans I saw to ensure that this happened, so copying wider to understand what has 
happened if this hasn’t been the case and to make the direct link with those leading on scripts etc. I 
also understand that your team have been on the daily calls on this so should be fully involved.
Ailsa
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE

messages.body:
Peter
I agree this is extremely important, I have been underlining with others why it matters and there were 
various plans I saw to ensure that this happened, so copying wider to understand what has 
happened if this hasn’t been the case and to make the direct link with those leading on scripts etc. I 
also understand that your team have been on the daily calls on this so should be fully involved.
Ailsa

***
***
***
***
JCS
JCS

Very best
Peter
